subcodes.first_line: O my God! Through Thy bounty Thou hast ordained for me to journey through the realm of souls and horizons [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و انی یا الهی قد قدرت لی السیر بفضلک فی ملکوت الانفس و الافاق
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
